facts: The Pilgrims sailed from England on a ship called the Mayflower and landed at Plymouth.
Thanksgiving comes from a harvest feast the Pilgrims shared with the Wampanoag people, not from a single meal in England.
A harvest feast is a big meal celebrating the food grown and gathered, like the one the Pilgrims and Wampanoag shared.
misconceptions: Thanksgiving was invented by the Pilgrims as a holiday they celebrated every year starting the first year they landed.
